context.projectOverview: Sprint 3 retry. Iteration 1 (commit 6f4029d) passed S3-C1/C2/C4/C5; failed S3-C3 only.

evaluatorFeedback: Iteration 1 FAILED S3-C3 ONLY (4/5; S3-C1/C2/C4/C5 are GREEN in commit 6f4029d — do NOT redo or regress them). The needs-clarification guard works functionally, but the user-facing message at src/cli/commands/sprint.ts:123 references the command 'npx agent-bober plan-answer <specId> <questionId> <answer>' with a HYPHEN. That command does not exist. The CLI registers 'answer' as a SUBCOMMAND of 'plan' (src/cli/index.ts:137), so the runnable form is 'npx agent-bober plan answer <specId> <questionId> "<answer>"' with a SPACE — exactly as used in src/cli/commands/plan.ts:219. REQUIRED FIXES: (1) Edit sprint.ts:123 to use the space form: Answer with 'npx agent-bober plan answer <specId> <questionId> "<answer>"', then re-run. (2) In src/cli/commands/sprint.test.ts, strengthen the S3-C3 test: spy on console.info (the refusal questions are logged via logger which writes to console.info/stdout) and assert the captured output contains the substring 'plan answer' (with a space) so this defect class is caught automatically. Keep S3-C1/C2/C4/C5 and all prior sprints' tests green; the 6 cockpit-integration E2E failures are pre-existing/unrelated.
instructionsPointer: Read the contract at .bober/contracts/sprint-spec-20260623-plan-contracts-materialization-3.json and the briefing at .bober/briefings/sprint-spec-20260623-plan-contracts-materialization-3-briefing.md.
